subject: [WIP. DO NOT MERGE] CSIT tests for SO vCPE/OOF/HPA
commit_message:
[WIP. DO NOT MERGE] CSIT tests for SO vCPE/OOF/HPA

Adds CSIT tests for vCPE Workflows in SO,
includes testing of OOF and HPA.

Change-Id: I773c835457e5112812d4d32ee72f8b16876b3c98
Issue-ID: SO-555
Signed-off-by: Shashank Kumar Shankar <shashank.kumar.shankar@intel.com>

Patch Set 25:

I talked to Seshu last night and he wanted us to use a common jenkins-job for all SO function tests. To accomplish this I submitted these two patches https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/42563 https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/42565

However if they get merged we will have to rethink a few things for these tests. Number one, we need to rename them to vcpe (we are testing vcpe but focusing on making sure hpa works in vcpe context). Number two we need to edit test/csit/plan/so/integration-testing rather than create our own setup.sh etc. Number three we probably should directly edit docker container config with our fake endpoint address. All of the sanity-checks are rest calls which are just looking for a successful status message. Endpoints will not affect their function. Finally we will have to edit the testplan and put vcpe.robot there (I've renamed here from hpa.robot).

In the meantime lets keep working on building out the test and when the above patches are merged we can adjust here.

Patch Set 33: Code-Review-1

Shashank, you just overwrote all of the hpa to vcpe changes that were made earlier to conform this test to Seshu's asks. Please revert back to those changes and start from there:
git fetch https://gerrit.onap.org/r/integration refs/changes/97/41097/32 && git checkout FETCH_HEAD

To avoid this in the future pull any changes to the patch first before making more additions.
